title: hymenophyllum ferrugineum subsp. berteroi
intro: Hymenophyllum ferrugineum subsp. berteroi, also known as the Berter's rusty liverwort, is a species of liverwort in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is native to tropical and subtropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum ferrugineum subsp. berteroi include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to accelerate wound healing and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or oil to create a topical solution for treating wounds and skin conditions.
